Poison Weapons.summary: Adds 50 Poison damage to all Direct damage.

Trained Tolerance.summary: Removes all DoTs from you and Heals you. 45.0s Cooldown.

Viper's Kiss.summary: Deals Poison damage and additional Poison damage over 12 seconds.

Blinding Grit.summary: Deals Weapon damage. If the target has Aftershock, removes it without dealing additional damage and Disarms the target for 4/7 seconds. If target has Aftershock: removes it (no extra dmg) + Disarm 4/7s 30.0s Cooldown.

Deflecting Stones.summary: Negates the damage of the next 3 Elemental hits taken within 30 seconds. 24.0s Cooldown.

Obscuring Dust.summary: Removes you from Combat and applies Stealth for 15s. 45.0s Cooldown.

Undermine.summary: Deals Earth damage. +100% Aftershock amount when attacking from behind. +100% Aftershock when attacking from behind

Cut a Path.summary: Briefly enters the Veil and greatly increases Movement Speed, then exits the Veil again. 6.0s Cooldown.

Dance of Death.summary: Grants +50% Parry Chance for 8 seconds and deals Weapon damage to attackers when Parrying. 60.0s Cooldown.

Death on the Wind.summary: Instantly leaps out from the Veil to your target and deals Weapon damage. Only usable while in the Veil, and only on targets in the Normal Plane. (Only while in the Veil; target in Normal Plane) 4.0s Cooldown.

Fade Into Trees.summary: You become Stealthed for 45 seconds. This Stealth is removed when you move or use an ability. 30.0s Cooldown.

Slowing Sap.summary: Deals Poison damage. Applies a Poison Debuff that Snares the target by 20% for 6 seconds and deals 480 Poison damage over the duration. Snare 20% for 6s + 480 Poison DoT 45.0s Cooldown.

Whirling Leaves.summary: Grants a 50% chance to avoid Ranged Physical hits for 10 seconds. 60.0s Cooldown.
